items.title: Nothing opens its first retail store in India
items.description: The two-story location will sell products from Nothing and the more affordable, mass-market brand CMF.

items.title: Indian pharmacy chain giant exposed customer data and internal systems
items.description: A backend flaw in web admin dashboards used by one of India's largest pharmacy chains, exposed thousands of online pharmacy orders.

items.title: Airbnb plans to bake in AI features for search, discovery and support
items.description: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky said the company wants to increase its use of large language models for customer discovery, support and engineering.

items.title: Airbnb says a third of its customer support is now handled by AI in the US and Canada
items.description: Airbnb was poised to introduce an app that doesn't just search for you, but one that "knows you." CEO Brian Chesky said, "It will help guests plan the...

items.title: Fintech lending giant Figure confirms data breach
